description: Remove dome theme and 8 unused ornamental themes (mihrab, mosaic, crescent, persian, mecca, marrakesh, ottoman, jannah) from the codebase
steps: 1. Remove 'dome' from SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS array in clock.js (it's in the photo-frame section around line 141).
2. Remove the entire <template id='layout-dome'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2808, ends at next template or closing tag).
3. Remove the 'Dome (Foto Kubah + Arch Cards) ★ FOTO' entry from layout_entries in arrays.xml AND the corresponding 'dome' value from layout_values.
4. Remove the entire <template id='layout-mihrab'> block from index.html (starts at line ~1850).
5. Remove the entire <template id='layout-mosaic'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2011).
6. Remove the entire <template id='layout-crescent'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2082).
7. Remove the entire <template id='layout-persian'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2160).
8. Remove the entire <template id='layout-mecca'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2248).
9. Remove the entire <template id='layout-marrakesh'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2335).
10. Remove the entire <template id='layout-ottoman'> block from index.html (starts at line ~1197).
11. Remove the entire <template id='layout-jannah'> block from index.html (starts at line ~2409).

12. Also remove any CSS rules in screen.css that reference these removed layout names (.layout-dome, .layout-mihrab, .layout-mosaic, .layout-crescent, .layout-persian, .layout-mecca, .layout-marrakesh, .layout-ottoman, .layout-jannah).
13. Verify these themes are NOT in arrays.xml (they should not be since they were never in SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS, but double check).
acceptance_criteria: 'dome' is not in SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS in clock.js
No 'dome' entry/value exists in arrays.xml layout_entries/layout_values
No templates exist for mihrab, mosaic, crescent, persian, mecca, marrakesh, ottoman, jannah in index.html
verification: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug and confirm build success
grep 'layout-dome\|layout-mihrab\|layout-mosaic\|layout-crescent\|layout-persian\|layout-mecca\|layout-marrakesh\|layout-ottoman\|layout-jannah' index.html should return no results
grep 'dome' clock.js SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS section should return no results
findings: Build requires JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2. All 9 templates (dome, mihrab, mosaic, crescent, persian, mecca, marrakesh, ottoman, jannah) removed from index.html, dome removed from SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS and arrays.xml, CSS rules for all removed layouts cleaned from screen.css including the prayer.next::before suppression block. Build successful with 807 lines removed total.
